Rows: Power of Holm's multiple comparison testing compared to others

gt_sql: SELECT T2.Id, T2.Title FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Harvey Motulsky' ORDER BY T2.ViewCount DESC LIMIT 1

Rows: Power of Holm's multiple comparison testing compared to others

pred_sql:
SELECT p.Id, p.Title
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE TRIM(u.DisplayName) = 'Harvey Motulsky'
ORDER BY p.ViewCount DESC
LIMIT 1;
